title: Speaking – Part 4: Discussion
description: The examiner asks broader questions related to the Part 3 theme.

content.theme: the impact of technology on communication

questions.question: To what extent do you think technology has improved the way we communicate?
Some people argue that technology has made face-to-face communication less important. Do you agree?
How might advances in virtual reality change our interactions in the future?
Is it the responsibility of technology companies to ensure privacy in communication?
What role does social media play in shaping people's attitudes towards global events?
Do you think younger and older generations have different views on the use of communication technology? Why might that be?

script.text: Now I'd like to ask you some more general questions related to the impact of technology on communication.
To what extent do you think technology has improved the way we communicate?
Some people argue that technology has made face-to-face communication less important. Do you agree?
How might advances in virtual reality change our interactions in the future?
Is it the responsibility of technology companies to ensure privacy in communication?
What role does social media play in shaping people's attitudes towards global events?
Do you think younger and older generations have different views on the use of communication technology? Why might that be?
Thank you very much. That is the end of the speaking test.
